strengths: Broad full-stack experience across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure
Recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq
Track record of founding open-source platforms and delivering workshops/talks
concerns: Career level is Senior/Staff, not Principal/Director-level IC
No advanced degree or recognized AI research/product track record
Limited demonstrated cloud-platform strategy or large-org entrepreneurial scope

key_factors.factor: Seniority mismatch vs Principal/Director IC bar
Lack of recognized AI expertise or shipped AI products at scale
Recent hands-on AI-agent and MCP tooling work

response.justification: Candidate is a versatile, craftsmanship-oriented engineer with ~15 years of experience and recent involvement in AI-agent tooling, but the role demands a Principal/Director-level IC with recognized AI expertise, cloud-platform strategy chops, and a track record of advising strategic customers. The resume shows depth in delivery but not the executive-level influence, AI thought leadership, or large-scale cloud/AI platform impact this role requires.
